nasb.text: So Jesus said to him, “Unless you people see signs and wonders, you simply will not believe.”

esv.text: So Jesus said to him, “Unless you  see signs and wonders you will not believe.”

cnv.text: 耶穌對他說：“你們若看不見神蹟奇事，總是不肯信。”

ccb.text: 耶稣对他说：“你们不看见神迹奇事，总不相信。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“你们如果没有看见神迹和奇事，你们就绝不会信！”
